title: 23.75'' Square Adjustable Height White Wood Table
features: Your guests will enjoy conversing and congregating around our white wood square cocktail table with adjustable height.
This table can function as a place to rest drinks or act as a display for other items with it's adjustable height from 40.5'' to 33'' using the lever located just under the top.
The combination of the white wood table top and chrome base give it a contemporary look while not sacrificing space at your venue with a narrow base that will stay out of the way of your patrons.
